parsed_output.justification: Mitchell explicitly claimed to be a werewolf, stating, 'I am a werewolf. 100% sure on this,' although he later attempted to deflect votes. James also claimed to be a werewolf but repeatedly encouraged the group to vote for him ('Vote for me', 'Kill James with me'), which is characteristic behavior of the Tanner. Given that the Tanner seeks elimination and the Werewolf avoids it, Mitchell is the most likely Werewolf.
